Career Timeline

Work
Experience

Sherpa IT · H&L POS
H&L POS
Jul 2025 – Present · Adelaide SA
Customer Support Officer
🇦🇺 Australia — Remote from India · via Sherpa IT
  • Serve as first-line technical support for H&L POS hospitality point-of-sale systems, diagnosing and resolving software, hardware, EFTPOS, and network issues for venues across Australia — minimising downtime during live trading hours.
  • Handle inbound support calls and tickets across the full H&L product suite including POS terminals, back-office reporting, kitchen display systems, and integrations with reservation and payment platforms.
  • Perform remote diagnostics and service restarts across distributed POS environments using secure remote-access tools, identifying root causes and applying targeted fixes without on-site visits.
  • Manage and prioritise incidents through CRM and ticketing platforms, maintaining SLA compliance and accurate case documentation for every interaction.
  • Coordinate with internal engineering, account management, and third-party vendors for escalated issues requiring deeper investigation or hardware replacement.
  • Proactively monitor system health alerts, identify recurring failure patterns, and contribute to knowledge base articles that reduce repeat ticket volume.
  • Deliver clear, jargon-free guidance to hospitality staff on POS workflows, end-of-day procedures, menu and pricing updates, and peripheral troubleshooting.
  • Maintain consistent AEST availability, supporting the Australian client base remotely from India with minimal latency impact on service quality.
H&L POSCRMRemote DiagnosticsKnowledge BaseHospitalitySLATraining
Sherpa IT · Impos POS
Impos POS
Feb 2025 – Jun 2025 · Melbourne VIC
Customer Support Specialist
🇦🇺 Australia — Remote from India · via Sherpa IT
  • Delivered first-line technical support for the ImPOS hospitality point-of-sale platform, resolving software faults, hardware failures, and network connectivity issues for restaurants, bars, and hotels across Melbourne VIC.
  • Managed the full support ticket lifecycle via Microsoft Dynamics 365 CRM — logging, categorising, prioritising, updating, and closing cases while keeping clients informed throughout resolution.
  • Troubleshot EFTPOS/payment terminal issues, receipt printer faults, cash drawer errors, and kitchen display system failures in high-pressure hospitality environments.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams including product, development, and on-site technicians to resolve complex or recurring issues requiring escalation beyond L1 scope.
  • Authored and maintained internal knowledge base articles for common fault scenarios, reducing average handle time and enabling consistent resolutions across the team.
  • Delivered training and onboarding guidance to new hospitality clients on POS system features, integrations, and daily operational workflows.
  • Maintained a professional, empathetic communication style under pressure — consistently turning frustrated clients into satisfied ones through clear explanations and swift action.

LTIMindtree
Jan 2024 – Jan 2025 · Bengaluru
Engineer — Cloud & Infra Management
🇮🇳 India — Client: EY (Ernst & Young)
  • Provided L1 access and identity support for EY's global workforce, handling user access requests, permission provisioning, and lockout resolutions across Microsoft 365, Dynamics CRM, and Power Apps environments.
  • Administered identity and access management through SailPoint IdentityIQ and OneAccess — processing joiner, mover, and leaver workflows while enforcing least-privilege access controls across EY's enterprise systems.
  • Managed user accounts and entitlements via Microsoft's admin portal, ensuring correct role assignments, group memberships, and licence allocations were applied accurately and on schedule.
  • Built and maintained ServiceNow dashboards tracking SLA compliance, ticket ageing, and access fulfilment metrics — providing leadership with real-time visibility into service desk performance.
  • Created and maintained Knowledge Base articles covering recurring access issues and standard IAM procedures, reducing repeat ticket volume and onboarding time for new team members.
  • Collaborated closely with global IT, HR, and security teams to coordinate access reviews, role recertifications, and urgent privilege escalations in line with EY's compliance framework.
  • Consistently met SLA targets in a fast-paced enterprise environment, demonstrating reliability, process discipline, and strong cross-functional communication.

Revolut
Aug 2023 – Nov 2023 · Remote
Support Specialist
🌐 Global Fintech
  • Served as frontline customer support for Revolut's global retail user base, handling account queries, transaction disputes, card issues, and app troubleshooting via in-app chat across multiple time zones.
  • Investigated and resolved payment failures, declined transactions, and cross-border transfer delays — cross-referencing MT103 SWIFT messages to trace and confirm international payment status.
  • Supported customers with a wide range of banking operations including inbound/outbound transfers, direct debits, card payments, and account verification processes under SWIFT, SEPA, ACH, and Faster Payments rails.
  • Handled sensitive financial queries with professionalism and strict adherence to Revolut's compliance, AML, and data privacy standards.
  • Escalated complex fraud, chargeback, and regulatory cases to specialist teams using Jira, maintaining clear audit trails and customer communication throughout.
  • Collaborated with international colleagues across multiple regions via Slack, Confluence, and Google Suite to share knowledge, align on product updates, and maintain consistent service standards.
  • Adapted quickly to Revolut's fast-evolving product suite, supporting new feature launches and maintaining up-to-date knowledge of fintech compliance requirements.

Trigent Software
Apr 2022 – Aug 2023 · India @ Wipro
Service Desk Engineer
🇮🇳 India — Deployed at Wipro
  • Operated as a key L1 service desk engineer embedded at Wipro's enterprise support centre, resolving end-user application, hardware, and connectivity tickets via ServiceNow — averaging 20+ tickets daily with a 99% CSAT rating.
  • Configured, deployed, and troubleshot Microsoft 365 environments including Exchange Online mailbox provisioning, licence assignment, Teams setup, SharePoint access, and OneDrive connectivity issues.
  • Managed Outlook-specific faults including PST/OST file backup and restoration, EMS (Exchange Management Shell) error resolution, mailbox permission issues, and email delivery failures.
  • Provided end-to-end laptop setup support for new joiners across the enterprise — configuring Domain-Joined and Windows Autopilot devices, enforcing Group Policy settings, and ensuring users were productive from day one.
  • Diagnosed and resolved Windows 10/11 desktop and laptop issues including OS errors, driver conflicts, software installation failures, VPN connectivity, and peripheral troubleshooting.
  • Maintained accurate ticket records in ServiceNow with full incident documentation — root cause, resolution steps, and follow-up actions — supporting audit readiness and knowledge transfer.
  • Escalated unresolved issues to L2/L3 teams with thorough handover notes, ensuring continuity of service and minimal disruption to business operations.
